## Description

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] Next.js project compiles without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] FastAPI tests pass successfully
- [ ] Strict TypeScript type-checking validated
- [ ] Visual styling matches the Verra Design System (dark-mode first, Inter/Newsreader fonts)
- [ ] All keyboard shortcuts (`⌘+K`, `⌘+Enter`, `⌘+Shift+C`, `?`) function correctly
